title: 'Enemy will become trapped in a deadly vortex': Iran claims 'full control' of Strait of Hormuz
summary_full: Iran's Revolutionary Guard Corps has asserted full control over the Strait of Hormuz, warning of severe consequences for any military vessels approaching. While civilian traffic is permitted under unspecified regulations, the move follows a US naval blockade order, escalating regional tensions.  A recent ceasefire's durability is uncertain after stalled talks.
